extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won shortened Stage 10 sprint after BORA-HANSGROHE shredded field from 43km out, eliminating NIZZOLO and MERLIER before final kilometer GC crash.
tactical_patterns: BORA-HANSGROHE pulled hard from 43km on short stage to eliminate sprinters before traditional leadout range began.
INEOS tactically grabbed intermediate sprint bonuses via EVENEPOEL-NARVAEZ reaction when Deceuninck attempted leadout, BERNAL took 1 second.
SAGAN positioned behind MORLUINI then switched corners rather than following own leadout, indicating planned chaos sprint strategy.

rider_signals.NIZZOLO Giacomo: negative: dropped on pace-making 40km+ from finish despite Ganna assistance, sprint form nowhere near 2016 Foligno runner-up level
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: eliminated by sustained pace before final 20km, indicating poor climbing capacity for lumpy sprint stages
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: cut BERNAL's GC lead from unknown to 14 seconds via aggressive intermediate sprint positioning
rider_signals.CAVIA Elia: negative: chose not to follow own MORLUINI leadout, suggesting team tactics breakdown or rider-pilot miscommunication
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: barely top 10 finish signals continued decline from peak sprint form
